attacking_style: Attacks early on final climbs (4-10km out), often into headwinds or on gradients that discourage immediate response. Prefers sustained power efforts over explosive accelerations, with notable success from long-range moves that exploit hesitation.
team_tactics: Frequently deployed as high-value domestique making repeated accelerations to soften rivals before protected rider attacks. When riding for himself, often lacks team support in critical moments (2018 puncture, 2017 crosswinds), forcing self-reliant tactics.
terrain_preference: Medium-gradient sustained climbs (4-10km) where power-to-weight trumps explosivity. Struggles on steep punchy finishes (Mur de Huy, Ans) and loses time on altitude efforts. Excels on Category 1 summit finishes with consistent gradients.
vulnerability: Exposed by poor positioning habits—sits too far back on flat stages leading to crashes and missing splits (2017, 2018 incidents). Lacks explosive power for steep ramps and uphill sprints. Minimal team support in crisis moments. Timing errors in uphill sprints.
key_patterns: Attacks 4-10km from summit finishes, gaining immediate gaps through committed long-range efforts (5 instances)
Positioned too far back in peloton, leading to crashes and missed crosswind splits (3 documented incidents)
Willingly sacrifices personal GC for team tactics, making repeated accelerations as super-domestique (4 examples)
Struggles on steep punchy gradients but competitive on sustained power climbs (6 contrasting results)
Shows exceptional resilience after crashes, continuing races with significant injuries (2 high-speed incidents)
Form peaks mid-season at Dauphiné/Tour after struggling in early-season classics (pattern across 2017-2018)
form_trajectory: positive: 2021 Giro stage win showed recovery after setbacks; 2020 Vuelta revealed underestimated form with stage win and 4th overall, demonstrating sustained competitive level into recent seasons
